requirement_topic.en: OCPP, EMC, Radio Modules, and Power Quality

summary.en: Networked EV chargers in Czechia should be specified for OCPP back-office interoperability where a charge-point operator, fleet operator, public-sector project, or DSO-linked programme requires remote monitoring, billing, diagnostics, or load management. Electrical and electronic emissions and immunity evidence should align with IEC 61000 EMC and power-quality standards. Cellular, Wi-Fi, RFID, payment, or smart-metering modules may trigger additional communications, spectrum, cybersecurity, and data-interface checks under Czech and EU requirements. The Czech Telecommunication Office (Český telekomunikační úřad — ČTÚ) regulates radio spectrum and type-approval for radio modules used in Czechia.
summary.zh: 在捷克，若充电点运营商、车队运营商、公共部门项目或DSO相关计划要求远程监控、计费、诊断或负载管理，联网充电桩应按OCPP后台互操作进行规定。电气和电子发射及抗扰度证据应与IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量标准一致。蜂窝、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能计量模块可能根据捷克和欧盟要求触发额外通信、频谱、网络安全和数据接口检查。捷克电信局（Český telekomunikační úřad，ČTÚ）负责监管捷克境内使用的无线模块的无线频谱和型式认证。
summary.zht: 在捷克，若充電點運營商、車隊運營商、公共部門項目或DSO相關計劃要求遠程監控、計費、診斷或負載管理，聯網充電樁應按OCPP後台互操作進行規定。電氣和電子發射及抗擾度證據應與IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質標準一致。蜂窩、Wi-Fi、RFID、支付或智能計量模組可能根據捷克和歐盟要求觸發額外通訊、頻譜、網絡安全和數據接口檢查。捷克電信局（Český telekomunikační úřad，ČTÚ）負責監管捷克境內使用的無線模組的無線頻譜和型式認證。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for networked EV chargers
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
IEC 61851-24 — digital communication between DC EV charging station and EV
RED 2014/53/EU — applicable to radio-module-equipped chargers in Czechia
ČTÚ (Český telekomunikační úřad) requirements for radio module type-approval in Czechia

summary.en: China DC fast chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 CAN communication between the off-board charger and vehicle BMS. This is not OCPP back-office communication and is not the CCS2 communication direction. China-market chargers may also include China-specific payment, SIM, cloud, and operator integrations that need reconfiguration for Czech operators, language (Czech), currency (CZK), and data interfaces. Chinese radio-module approvals (MIIT SRRC) are not recognised in Czechia; EU RED conformity and Czech ČTÚ compliance are required.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充通常采用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通信，用于非车载充电机与车辆BMS之间通信。该协议不是OCPP后台通信，也不是CCS2通信方向。中国市场充电桩还可能包含中国特定支付、SIM卡、云平台和运营商集成，需要为捷克运营商、语言（捷克语）、货币（捷克克朗）和数据接口重新配置。中国无线模块型式认证（工信部SRRC）在捷克不被认可；须符合欧盟RED合规和捷克ČTÚ要求。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充通常採用GB/T 27930-2023 CAN通訊，用於非車載充電機與車輛BMS之間通訊。該協議不是OCPP後台通訊，也不是CCS2通訊方向。中國市場充電樁還可能包含中國特定支付、SIM卡、雲平台和運營商集成，需要為捷克運營商、語言（捷克語）、貨幣（捷克克朗）和數據接口重新配置。中國無線模組型式認證（工信部SRRC）在捷克不被認可；須符合歐盟RED合規和捷克ČTÚ要求。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC radio module approvals (China domestic only — not recognised in EU/Czechia)

gap.en: Exporters must confirm the OCPP version, charge-point-management-system integration, remote diagnostics, load management, payment or RFID flow, SIM or communications module EU RED type-approval path, and IEC 61000 EMC reports for the final Czechia configuration. For DC CCS2 products, GB/T 27930 must not be presented as the relevant communication evidence. Harmonic current and immunity data should be reviewed against specific Czech DSO supply-point requirements. Czech-language UI, menus, and error messages are commonly expected by Czech operators and building-permit authorities. Payment integration must support CZK and EU ad-hoc payment methods per AFIR.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认最终捷克配置的OCPP版本、充电点管理系统集成、远程诊断、负载管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通信模块欧盟RED型式认证路径，以及IEC 61000 EMC报告。对于直流CCS2产品，不得将GB/T 27930作为相关通信证据提交。谐波电流和抗扰度数据应结合具体捷克DSO供电点要求进行审查。捷克运营商和建筑许可主管机构通常要求UI界面、菜单和错误信息提供捷克语版本。支付集成须支持捷克克朗及符合AFIR的欧盟即时支付方式。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認最終捷克配置的OCPP版本、充電點管理系統集成、遠程診斷、負載管理、支付或RFID流程、SIM或通訊模組歐盟RED型式認證路徑，以及IEC 61000 EMC報告。對於直流CCS2產品，不得將GB/T 27930作為相關通訊證據提交。諧波電流和抗擾度數據應結合具體捷克DSO供電點要求進行審查。捷克運營商和建築許可主管機構通常要求UI介面、選單和錯誤信息提供捷克語版本。支付集成須支持捷克克朗及符合AFIR的歐盟即時支付方式。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific but commonly mandatory for networked public, fleet, or utility-linked chargers in Czechia; EMC and power-quality evidence is expected under EU directives and DSO specifications; RED conformity is mandatory for radio-equipped chargers
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-charger communication and is not OCPP or CCS2 back-office evidence; SRRC is China domestic radio approval only

source.publisher: Czech Office for Standards, Metrology and Testing (ÚNMZ)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Czechia networked chargers should be validated for OCPP integration, IEC 61000 EMC and power quality, EU RED conformity for radio modules (not China SRRC), and local Czech DSO requirements. GB/T 27930 alone does not satisfy OCPP, CCS2 communication, or back-office interoperability needs. Czech-language localisation and CZK payment support are commonly expected.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 捷克联网充电桩应验证OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和电能质量、无线模块欧盟RED合规（非中国SRRC），以及捷克当地DSO要求。仅有GB/T 27930不能满足OCPP、CCS2通信或后台互操作需求。通常还需要捷克语本地化和捷克克朗支付支持。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 捷克聯網充電樁應驗證OCPP集成、IEC 61000 EMC和電能品質、無線模組歐盟RED合規（非中國SRRC），以及捷克當地DSO要求。僅有GB/T 27930不能滿足OCPP、CCS2通訊或後台互操作需求。通常還需要捷克語本地化和捷克克朗支付支持。
